creator: jimmiejaz@gmail.com
text:
/bin/sh ../../libtool --tag=CC --tag=CC   --mode=compile cc -std=gnu99 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../..   -I../../include -I../../include  -I/usr/local/include -DSYS_FREEBSD7_1 `top_builddir="../.." ../../vlc-config --cflags plugin libaccess_http_plugin_la-http.lo` -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=pentium4 -pthread -Wall -Wextra -Wsign-compare -Wundef -Wpointer-arith -Wbad-function-cast -Wcast-align -Wwrite-strings -Wmissing-prototypes -Wvolatile-register-var -MT libaccess_http_plugin_la-http.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/libaccess_http_plugin_la-http.Tpo -c -o libaccess_http_plugin_la-http.lo `test -f 'http.c' || echo './'`http.c
libtool: compile:  cc -std=gnu99 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../.. -I../../include -I../../include -I/usr/local/include -DSYS_FREEBSD7_1 -I/usr/local/include -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -D__USE_UNIX98 -D_LARGEFILE64_SOURCE -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE -DHAVE_RELEASE -D__LIBVLC__ -D__PLUGIN__ -DMODULE_NAME=access_http -DMODULE_NAME_IS_access_http -DMODULE_STRING=\"access_http\" -O3 -ffast-math -funroll-loops -mtune=pentium2 -fomit-frame-pointer -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=pentium4 -pthread -Wall -Wextra -Wsign-compare -Wundef -Wpointer-arith -Wbad-function-cast -Wcast-align -Wwrite-strings -Wmissing-prototypes -Wvolatile-register-var -MT libaccess_http_plugin_la-http.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/libaccess_http_plugin_la-http.Tpo -c http.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/libaccess_http_plugin_la-http.o
In file included from http.c:57:

http.c:332: error: for each function it appears in.)
